title: Breach Candy Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Breach Candy Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!
